segments.text: The words of Jeremiah the son of Hilkiah, one of the priests who were in Anathoth in the land of Benjamin.
Yahweh’s word came to him in the days of Josiah the son of Amon, king of Judah, in the thirteenth year of his reign.

footnotes.text: + 'Yahweh  is God’s proper Name, sometimes rendered  'LORD (all caps) in other translations.

segments.text: It came also in the days of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, to the end of the eleventh year of Zedekiah, the son of Josiah, king of Judah, to the carrying away of Jerusalem captive in the fifth month.
Now Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,

Before I formed you in the womb, I knew you. Before you were born, I sanctified you. 
I have appointed you a prophet to the nations.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Then I said,
Ah, Lord Yahweh! Behold,  I don’t know how to speak; for I am a child.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

footnotes.text: + 'Behold , from  'הִנֵּה, means look at, take notice, observe, see, or gaze at. It is often used as an interjection.

segments.text: But Yahweh said to me,
Don’t say, ‘I am a child;’ for you must go to whomever I send you, and you must say whatever I command you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Don’t be afraid because of them, for I am with you to rescue you,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: says Yahweh.
Then Yahweh stretched out his hand and touched my mouth. Then Yahweh said to me,
Behold, I have put my words in your mouth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Behold, I have today set you over the nations and over the kingdoms, to uproot and to tear down, to destroy and to overthrow, to build and to plant.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Moreover Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,
Jeremiah, what do you see?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I said,
I see a branch of an almond tree.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: Then Yahweh said to me,
You have seen well; for I watch over my word to perform it.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Yahweh’s word came to me the second time, saying,
What do you see?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I said,
I see a boiling cauldron; and it is tipping away from the north.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: Then Yahweh said to me,
Out of the north, evil will break out on all the inhabitants of the land.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For behold, I will call all the families of the kingdoms of the north,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: says Yahweh.
They will come, and they will each set his throne at the entrance of the gates of Jerusalem, and against all its walls all around, and against all the cities of Judah.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
I will utter my judgments against them concerning all their wickedness, in that they have forsaken me, 
and have burned incense to other gods, 
and worshiped the works of their own hands.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You therefore put your belt on your waist, arise, and say to them all that I command you. Don’t be dismayed at them, lest I dismay you before them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For behold, I have made you today a fortified city, an iron pillar, and bronze walls against the whole land—against the kings of Judah, against its princes, against its priests, and against the people of the land.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They will fight against you, but they will not prevail against you; for I am with you
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: says Yahweh,
to rescue you.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
